description: Configure Stellarium for a Galactic plane survey from the ALMA observatory in Chile (23.019° S, 67.753° W, Altitude: 5050m). Set the simulation date and time to July 15, 2024, at 03:00 UTC. Configure the display for a radio astronomy survey by disabling the atmosphere and landscape, and enabling both the Galactic Grid and Galactic Equator. Save the configuration so the setup persists. Locate and center the view on the constellation Sagittarius, then save a screenshot to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Write an observation note to ~/Desktop/galactic_survey_plan.txt that explicitly mentions 'Sagittarius', 'ALMA', and 'July 15'.
